channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Home
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: From RAG to Search-R1 - Evolving Language Models from Knowledge Retrieval to Autonomous Reasoning
item.description: From RAG to Search-R1: Evolving Language Models from Knowledge Retrieval to Autonomous Reasoning An accessible comparison of RAG and Search-R1 — tracing the evolution from single-pass retrieval toward autonomous, multi-turn search-and-reasoning agents trained with reinforcement learning.

item.title: PCA vs t-SNE: which one should you use for visualization
item.description: PCA vs t-SNE: which one should you use for visualization Author: Namratesh Shrivastav Source: medium.com/analytics-vidhya/pca-vs-t-sne-17bcd882bf3d Summary Practical comparison of PCA and t-SNE on the MNIST dataset (60K training images, 784 dimensions per sample).

item.title: PCA vs t-SNE vs UMAP: Visualizing the Invisible in Your Data
item.description: PCA vs t-SNE vs UMAP: Visualizing the Invisible in Your Data Author: Lakhan Bukkawar Source: medium.com/@laakhanbukkawar/pca-vs-t-sne-vs-umap-visualizing-the-invisible-in-your-data-92cb2baebdbb Summary Side-by-side comparison of PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP with Python implementations on the Iris dataset.

item.title: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) In Depth
item.description: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) In Depth Author: Fraidoon Omarzai Source: medium.com/@fraidoonomarzai99/principal-component-analysis-pca-in-depth-93c871f25dfa Summary Step-by-step walkthrough of the PCA algorithm from linear algebra foundations through Python implementation.

item.title: SEARCH-R1 - Reinforcement Learning-Enhanced Multi-Turn Search and Reasoning for LLMs
item.description: SEARCH-R1: Reinforcement Learning-Enhanced Multi-Turn Search and Reasoning for LLMs A technical walkthrough of the Search-R1 framework (arxiv: 2503.09516) — an RL-based approach that trains LLMs to interleave multi-turn search queries with chain-of-thought reasoning, without requiring human-labeled ...

item.title: Understanding Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
item.description: Understanding Principal Component Analysis (PCA) Author: Roshmita Dey Source: medium.com/@roshmitadey/understanding-principal-component-analysis-pca-d4bb40e12d33 Summary Comprehensive guide covering why dimensionality reduction is needed, the mathematics of PCA, and applications across domains.

item.title: t-SNE clearly explained
item.description: t-SNE clearly explained Author: Kemal Erdem Source: medium.com/data-science/t-sne-clearly-explained-d84c537f53a Summary Intuitive explanation of t-SNE including comparison with PCA, the math of the probability distributions, and two optimization tricks (early compression, early exaggeration).
